{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321122918449C0DF194A51FFD88E1"}"},"total":11},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617678332451160857","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看呀，作者大大加油，千万别停更[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773635588,"group_id":"7612929674766715929","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"作者玻璃心，第一次下水","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ELMvb4Mv1nqzJ1iRzYR7bj+FgE0j/wFfl8Xz7e/2my","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3292413001733516","user_name":"缱绻残云的温柔"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3292413001733516","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612929674766715929","book_info":{"abstract":"我穿越了，或许灵魂影响肉身，我成为了男版的春野樱，鉴于关键人物已经和原作相去甚远，我也没有变性的打算，只想远离或许即将崩坏的高危剧情。
但是看见那只金毛小狐狸孤孤单单的样子还是心软了，破例一次以后，遇见那只傲娇的黑猫似乎也只有再次破例的选项。
本以为只是顺手帮个忙。
没想到两个小鬼长大后，非要赖在我家不走。
“樱，一起回家。”
“我最喜欢樱了！”
等等，是不是哪里不对？
这俩小子看我的眼神，怎么越来越奇怪了？
